name: io.github.HurleySk/adf-graph
description: MCP server that builds a queryable dependency graph from ADF pipeline artifacts

tools.name: graph_stats
tools.description: Node/edge counts by type, build time, staleness flag

tools.name: graph_find_consumers
tools.description: All pipeline activities that read/write/call a given artifact

tools.name: graph_describe_pipeline
tools.description: Pipeline summary, activity list, or full detail with column mappings. Supports activity filter and nested container activities (Until/ForEach/IfCondition).

tools.name: graph_describe_entity
tools.description: Describe a Dataverse entity: metadata, attributes, pipeline consumers. Full depth includes types and required levels from schema.

tools.name: graph_impact_analysis
tools.description: All nodes affected upstream/downstream if an artifact changes

tools.name: graph_data_lineage
tools.description: Data flow paths for a Dataverse entity or staging table with optional column filter. SP column mappings include source/target table and transform expressions.

tools.name: graph_find_paths
tools.description: All dependency paths between two named nodes

tools.name: graph_diff_pipeline
tools.description: Compare a pipeline's structure across two environments with line-level SQL diffs

tools.name: graph_deploy_readiness
tools.description: Pre-flight dependency check for a pipeline in a target environment

tools.name: graph_trace_parameters
tools.description: Trace parameter flow through ExecutePipeline chains, flag dead-end parameters

tools.name: graph_list_environments
tools.description: List all configured environments with paths, stats, and staleness

tools.name: graph_add_overlay
tools.description: Add an overlay path to an environment for merged graph views

tools.name: graph_remove_overlay
tools.description: Remove a runtime overlay from an environment

tools.name: graph_list_overlays
tools.description: List all overlays for an environment

tools.name: graph_add_environment
tools.description: Register a new ephemeral environment pointing to an ADF root

tools.name: graph_remove_environment
tools.description: Remove a runtime environment

tools.name: graph_find_orchestrators
tools.description: Find root orchestrator pipelines that own a given pipeline with full ancestry chains

tools.name: graph_diff_environments
tools.description: Compare pipelines across two environments, showing added/removed/changed artifacts

tools.name: graph_validate
tools.description: Graph-wide validation: broken references, empty defaults, unused datasets, orphan nodes

tools.name: graph_search
tools.description: Flexible search: node names, activity SQL, FetchXML, SP names/parameters. Supports filters for activity type, node type, target entity, and pipeline scope

tools.name: graph_trace_connection
tools.description: Trace pipeline activities through datasets, linked services, and credentials with full connection metadata

tools.name: graph_cross_env_artifact
tools.description: Compare a single artifact across all environments with field-level diffs

tools.name: graph_validate_pipeline
tools.description: Validate dest_query column aliases against Dataverse entity schema, flagging invalid mappings

tools.name: graph_validate_statuscode
tools.description: Validate CASE WHEN statuscode/statecode values against Dataverse OptionSet metadata

tools.name: graph_find_bad_columns
tools.description: Bulk audit all pipelines for dest_query column aliases that don't match Dataverse entity attributes

tools.name: graph_ignore_null_values_audit
tools.description: Scan Copy activities writing to Dataverse and flag those with dangerous ignoreNullValues default

tools.name: graph_staging_dependencies
tools.description: Map shared staging table usage across pipelines with truncate detection

tools.name: graph_entity_coverage
tools.description: Show all pipelines writing to a Dataverse entity with per-pipeline column lists

tools.name: graph_parameter_trace
tools.description: Trace parameter values from parent to child pipelines via ExecutePipeline activities

tools.name: graph_diff_staging
tools.description: Compare staged pipeline changes against deployed version with auto-detection

environmentVariables.name: ADF_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Path to directory containing ADF artifacts (pipeline/, dataset/, etc.). Used for single-environment setup.

environmentVariables.name: ADF_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Path to adf-graph.json config file for multi-environment setup. Takes priority over ADF_ROOT.
